forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely during the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely this afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely during the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south later tonight. Possible small hail this evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, with possible small hail in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending south to southwesterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from late this morning. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending south to southwesterly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, most likely late this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southerly in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 10:30am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending southerly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 23.
Sun protection 10:00am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
